rationale: Both reviews surface the identical real naming issue (mapValue and its apply/id/comp lemmas at lines 155/160/165, which is post-composition lifted to →* and has no precedent matching the AlgHom/WithConv style elsewhere in the diff or Mathlib); acting on either produces an equivalent rename away from the nonstandard name, and the exact alternative suggested is not a material distinction a maintainer would insist on.
